seoTitle: Adjungbilly vs Afterlee — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Adjungbilly and Afterlee. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Adjungbilly and Afterlee.
heading: Adjungbilly vs Afterlee — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Adjungbilly, New South Wales and Afterlee, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Afterlee has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Adjungbilly (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Adjungbilly or Afterlee safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Adjungbilly has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Afterlee scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Adjungbilly scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Afterlee scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Adjungbilly or Afterlee?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Afterlee has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
